ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "from_account" TEXT /* Account identifier from which the amount is sent */,
  "to_account" TEXT /* Account identifier to which the amount is received */,
  "amount_sent" REAL /* Amount sent in the transaction */,
  "amount_received" REAL /* Amount received in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., transfer, payment, receipt) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transaction */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used for the transaction (e.g., PayPal, Stripe) */,
  "external_transaction_id" TEXT /* External transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES transaction_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_account FOREIGN KEY ("to_account") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_from_account FOREIGN KEY ("from_account") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_holder" TEXT /* Full name of the account holder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the account */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Completed, Pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., transfer, payment, receipt) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., account holder, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being acted upon */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., initiated, cancelled) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway (e.g., PayPal, Stripe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)
